name: dotnet-source
description: ReSharper-style source navigation for the .NET solution you're editing — search by name and kind, outline a type's full member list including private members with partials merged, project/namespace/type map, god-class metrics, and semantic find-usages / impls / calls / unused. Reads .cs with Roslyn, so it works on code that doesn't compile and sees the private guts a metadata reader can't. One compiled binary, built once and cached; optional `serve` daemon keeps the Roslyn compilation warm (find-usages 15s -> 170ms).
